authority: Department of Food and Civil Supplies
note: Representative demo rules for HaqSetu. Production must load the authority's official eligibility rules.

benefit.description_en: Subsidised foodgrain (rice/wheat) per person per month

explain.en: Your annual household income is below ₹3,00,000
explain.hi: आपकी वार्षिक पारिवारिक आय ₹3,00,000 से कम है

explain.en: You have a household to cover

name.hi: परिवार के मुखिया का पासपोर्ट फोटो
